mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (title, content, user_id, is_notice) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{isNotice})
INSERT INTO post_files (file_name, file_path, post_id) VALUES (#{originalFileName}, #{s3Key}, #{postId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS writer, l.like_count FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id) l ON p.post_id = l.post_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'deleted', deleted_at =NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}) AS is_like, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM post_reports WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}) AS is_report
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_reports (user_id, post_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{reason})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = #{status} And is_notice = 0
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.created_at, p.view_count, u.nickname AS writer, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.post_id) AS like_count , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND user_id = #{userId}) > 0 AS is_like
, false AS is_like FROM posts p LEFT OUTER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = #{status} And is_notice = 0
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{naviSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.created_at, p.view_count, p.is_notice, u.nickname AS writer, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.post_id) AS like_count , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND user_id = #{userId}) > 0 AS is_like
, false AS is_like FROM posts p LEFT OUTER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = 'active' AND p.is_notice = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
